data.information:
A temporary evacuation point is set up at the CA Valley CSD - 13080 Soda Lake Rd, Santa Margarita, CA 93453 - per Emergency SLO

The Temporary Evacuation Point is not open after regular business hours. 
The American Red Cross can be reached at 805-678-3073 for general questions.

data.evacuation_orders: Maili mauka (towards the mountain) of Kaukamana St

data.information:
Emergency Shelter Status: OPEN at Waianae Intermediate School (85-626 Farrington Hwy, Waianae, HI 96792)

Bring emergency supplies with you, if possible. Do not forget to bring your medications.

Shelters are pet friendly but pets must be in a carrier or leash. Bring pet food and other essential supplies to care for your pet if you can. For more information, see the HNL Alert
